prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: chapter poster. Story world: Red Creek Winter. Premise: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi.. Setting: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown. Threat presence: The White Knife. Recurring motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass. Arc focus: Interference and Doubt (MIDDLE). Summary: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.. Subgenre: small-town slasher mystery. Tone: INTENSE. Arc focus: Interference and Doubt (MIDDLE). Summary: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.. Immediate scene brief: Red Creek Winter - Interference and Doubt Arc Key Art. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
